name: Terry
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 223; Episode 146

Terry was the bartender of Wild Cherry at Mock Town. He was not named in the Manga but his name was given in the databooks. He seemed to share similar principles to Sanji and Zeff as he was shown to be impartial to any customer regardless be they pirates but does not laugh at Luffy, Zoro and Nami. This suggests that he was able to see through the fact that the two Straw Hats were only holding back to prevent a bigger ruckus from occurring. He is the one who serves cherry pie and soda to Blackbeard and Luffy.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
